title: Smoky Chicken Fajitas
description: A flavorful and spicy Mexican dish made with seared chicken breasts and served with a side of smoky spices.
instructions: 1. Heat the pan over medium-high heat.
2. Add the chicken breasts and sear for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
3. Remove the chicken from the pan and set aside.
4. Add the fajitas to the pan and cook according to the package instructions.
5. Add the smoky spices, garlic, onion, and bell peppers to the pan and cook until the vegetables are tender.
6. Slice the cooked chicken into strips and add it to the pan.
7. Serve the chicken and vegetables hot, garnished with lime wedges and cilantro.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Serve with warm flour or corn tortillas.
